riskClass: auth or identity; permission, secret, or trust-boundary logic
workDescription: ADM-011 — add staff via (1) promote-existing-user (composes 2 already-locked routes byte-unmodified) and (2) email invite backed by a new single-use, expiring, hashed-token staff_invites table + a magic-link-backed accept flow. The invite flow creates the magic-link session/account FIRST (plain customer role), then applies the invite's stored role and branch during the authenticated /staff-invite/consume call, after re-checking the account's current role — privileges are NOT pre-provisioned at account creation. Both paths are super_admin-only and grant privilege up to super_admin.
approver: vc-validate-agent (automated Layer 1/Layer 2 fan-out) — see verification.json and adversarial-validation.json for the analysis this classification rests on
note: review-decision.json is deliberately NOT created by this VALIDATE pass. Per the manual-first evidence contract, an explicit human APPROVE/REJECT decision is required before EXECUTE is authorized — this agent does not self-approve a privilege-granting surface. See the plan's Validate Contract 'Gate: CONDITIONAL' and 'Accepted by' fields for what specifically needs human sign-off.
